senses.gloss: to keep watch, preserve, to stay awake, to speak at night, to speak late at night, to live night-life, to be around at night (of people and animals)
to brown, to add brownness to, to tan etc.
acacia, a plant of several species of the Acacieae tribe
to fasten by means of nails, to tack etc.

etymology.text:
Compare Hebrew שמר (šamár, “to guard, save, keep watch”).

Denominal verb of مِسْمَار (mismār).

See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.
